description_long: This is a modern, low-profile shelving unit with a distinctive design featuring two thick, rounded wooden side panels and matching top and bottom surfaces. The central section is composed of two horizontal glass or acrylic shelves supported by a black vertical panel with three circular cutouts, adding a decorative and structural element. The open sides and front provide easy access to the shelves, making it suitable for displaying or storing items. The wood has a rich, medium-brown finish with visible grain, while the shelves appear semi-transparent and the central support is matte black. The overall construction suggests a blend of contemporary and functional aesthetics, ideal for urban interiors or public spaces. The unit is sturdy and likely intended for use as a media console, display shelf, or low cabinet.
description: A modern, low-profile shelving unit with thick wooden sides, glass shelves, and a black central support with circular cutouts. The open design and rich wood finish give it a contemporary, functional look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open shelves, black central support with three circular cutouts, and thick wooden side panels.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the rounded edges of the wooden panels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid wooden back panel with circular cutouts and the absence of visible shelves from this angle.
description_view_3: Angled rear view showing the back panel, side structure, and partial visibility of the glass shelves.
